mainEntity.name: Does oil canning affect roof performance?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. It’s only an optical illusion; the roof’s water barrier remains intact.

mainEntity.name: Can I fix oil canning after installation?

acceptedAnswer.text: The only fix is to replace flat panels with ribbed ones; there’s no coating that eliminates the effect.

mainEntity.name: Is oil canning covered by insurance?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, because it isn’t a leak or structural damage.

mainEntity.name: Will oil canning show up in home inspections?

acceptedAnswer.text: Inspectors note it as a visual characteristic, not a defect.

mainEntity.name: Do all metal roof manufacturers offer striated panels?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most major suppliers do; Tim’s supplier GF Coast Supply provides both flat and striated options.
